data.name: ZVtok — AI TikTok studio
data.description: TikTok content engine (Claude Code tips carousels + real bug-fix documentary videos) that sells ZVlabs digital products — Claude Code packs and workflow tooling — on Gumroad. First milestone: 10–20 organic sales.
data.nextStep: Neil posts the first carousel today (7 PNGs + caption in ~/Downloads/zvtok-2026-07-16-hidden-features/, checklist in the post's brief.md). Then draft carousels 2-3 reusing the same slide.css/render.sh template. Session 1 (documentary dock-bug film) still open whenever Neil's ready to record. Full plan in ~/Claude/zvtok/CLAUDE.md.
data.lastDid: Shipped the first piece of content, skipping ahead of the documentary track since a tips post doesn't need to wait on filming. Used fable-planner to plan it, then built a reusable slide pipeline (HTML/CSS -> headless Chrome -> exact 1080x1440 PNGs, dark terminal aesthetic, numbered preview-dots for swipe-through) and produced the first carousel: "5 Claude Code features most people never find," 7 slides, QA'd and delivered to Downloads with caption ready to post. Also confirmed Gumroad's fee structure at the source (free to list, 10%+$0.50/sale) and Payhip as a free-to-list backup option; decided to stay Gumroad-only for now since the bio link can't go live until ~1,000 followers anyway.
data.notes:
• Single account (existing ZVlabs TikTok, @zvlabs), personal not business (keeps trending sounds; bio link unlocks at ~1,000 followers)
• Track A: tips carousels 2–3×/week (growth) · Track B: documentary bug-fix videos, irregular (conversion)
• Products: one-time Gumroad files ~$5–$15; first product = iOS PWA polish kit built on ~/Claude/dock-issue
• Inbound only — no ads, no cold outreach; cross-post videos to YouTube Shorts as a free hedge
• Claude leads writing/engineering/slides/analytics; Neil records, voices, posts (~2–4 hrs/wk)
• Realistic expectations: 10–20 sales in ~2–3 months is the win condition, not big income
• performance-log.md tracks per-post views/saves/shares/follows, reviewed weekly

log.text: Built and shipped the first Track A tips carousel ("5 Claude Code features most people never find") via fable-planner plan + execution: reusable HTML/CSS -> headless Chrome render pipeline, 7 QA'd 1080x1440 slides, caption, delivered to ~/Downloads ready to post. Verified Gumroad/Payhip fees at source; confirmed Gumroad-only for now is fine since bio link needs ~1,000 followers regardless. Set up performance-log.md.

Founded the venture. Reviewed the ZVlabs TikTok+Gumroad strategy brief, verified the market on Gumroad (competitor Claude Code packs exist; outcomes sell, collections don't), delivered the viability verdict (viable as low-risk build, not near-term income), and made two calls: keep the dock-bug as the first documentary video but sell the whole iOS PWA polish kit as the product, and cross-post videos to YouTube Shorts. Set up ~/Claude/zvtok (CLAUDE.md handoff + original brief + Claude Code launcher) and this hub entry.
